basic_details.job_title: MIDHANI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Group General Manager, General Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI) Group General Manager, General Manager Recruitment 2026 has been officially announced on 06 May 2026 at the official website https://www.midhani-india.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been released under the MIDHANI Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates meeting the age criteria as per Government of India rules and holding the required educational qualifications in Engineering/Metallurgy/Material Science/HR can apply via offline mode from 06 May 2026 to 06 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and application form through the direct

age_limit.details: The age limit for all posts is as per Govt. of India rules. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science), ME/M.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science), BE/B.Tech (Mechanical / Production / Electrical / Civil), 2-year full-time PG in HR / PMIR / MBA (HR) / MSW
qualification.details: Group General Manager (Production): BE/B.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science) with >=60% marks and 20 years of experience OR ME/M.Tech with 18 years of experience in production in a metallurgical process plant. Group General Manager (Projects): BE/B.Tech preferably Metallurgy/Mechanical/Production/Electrical/Civil with >=60% marks and 20 years of experience OR ME/M.Tech with 18 years of experience in setting up projects. General Manager (Quality): BE/B.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science) with >=60% marks and 17 years of experience OR ME/M.Tech with 15 years of experience in quality control in a metallurgical plant. General Manager (R&D): ME/M.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science) with >=60% marks (PhD preferred) and 15 years of post-qualification experience in R&D. General Manager (HR): Degree preferably in Engineering/Physical Sciences plus a 2-year full-time PG in HR/PMIR/MBA(HR)/MSW and 20 years of post-qualification experience in HR.

salary_details.details: Group General Manager (Production & Projects): Rs. 1,20,000 - 3% - Rs. 2,80,000 (approx CTC Rs. 31.3 Lakhs) Per Month General Manager (Quality, R&D, HR): Rs. 1,00,000 - 3% - Rs. 2,60,000 (approx CTC Rs. 26.0 Lakhs) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MIDHANI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.midhani-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
